landing.heroDesc:
One selfie — AI analyzes your colors, skin type & body shape.
8 wellness modules for personalized insights, all in one place.
landing.module0Desc: One selfie → Find your Spring/Summer/Autumn/Winter type in 30s
landing.module1Desc: One selfie → Hydration, oil & sensitivity across 6 zones
landing.module2Desc: Full-body photo → Body type classification + styling tips
landing.module3Desc: Based on your body & goals → Auto-generated weekly plan
landing.preview0Sub: Coral pink looks great on you
landing.preview1Sub: Combination skin · T-zone oil care recommended
landing.preview2Sub: Waist-defining fits are your best match
landing.bottomCtaDesc:
Start with a personal color analysis
to unlock your full personalized experience.
landing.footerDisclaimer: Yiroom's results are AI-generated reference information and do not replace medical diagnosis.

skin.title: Skin Analysis
skin.photoNeeded: A photo is needed for skin analysis
skin.modeCameraDesc: Real-time camera for front + left/right multi-angle capture

subtitle.input: Curious about styles that suit you?
subtitle.multiAngle: Take front, left side, right side, and back photos

hair.title: Hair Analysis
hair.guideTip1: Take photos in bright, natural light
hair.guideTip2: Capture the scalp area along the parting
hair.guideTip3: A photo showing the full hair is also helpful
hair.guideAvoid: Avoid taking photos with wet hair or after using styling products
hair.selectConcerns: Select your main concerns (multiple selection allowed)

makeup.title: Makeup Analysis
makeup.existingResultAria: View existing makeup analysis result ({score} pts)

oral.title: Oral Health Analysis
oral.guideTip1: Open your mouth wide under bright lighting
oral.guideTip2: Show both upper and lower teeth if possible
oral.guideTip3: Make sure your gums are visible to check gum health
oral.guideTip4: Clean teeth before photographing for better accuracy
oral.photoSelectAria: Select photo for oral health analysis
oral.uploadHint: Select a photo that clearly shows your teeth and gums
oral.privacyNote: Photos are used only for analysis and are not stored on the server
oral.aiAnalyzing: AI is analyzing your oral health

posture.title: Posture Analysis
posture.sidePhotoHint: Adding a side photo enables analysis of forward head posture, back curvature, and pelvic tilt. Skipping will provide front-only analysis.
